items.author: series
items.caption: For years, strong private companies stayed away from public markets. But in 2026, names like SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic are at the center of the buzz.
items.note: Instagram reel frames 2026 as IPO buzz for private companies SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. Treat as a watch-only IPO/social lead, not confirmed IPO timing and not a trade signal. Confirm only through official S-1/F-1 filings, SEC records, exchange listings, company announcements, or reliable primary-market reporting.
items.raw_request: tell me when the ipo is coming for spacex open ai and others from this website https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVRUiuXDSgn/?igsh=MWtxdDVna3RyamlmaQ== add this to my scan pipeline
items.decision_policy: Research lead only; never mark buy_now from a social-media link. Private companies have no public common-stock ticker here, so require independent official IPO filings or company/exchange confirmation before any trading or proxy idea is considered.

source_quality_policy.A: local OpenD market data or official filing data
source_quality_policy.B: reputable market/news API or direct source URL in local reports
source_quality_policy.C: parsed alternative-data provider or delayed congressional/institutional disclosure
source_quality_policy.D: social/news/reel lead only; never enough for buy_now by itself

# Bottleneck Scan - 2026-06-09 20:23:24

Research-only. No orders were placed.
Config: `C:\Users\user\.codex\automations\trading_pipeline\config\pipeline_config.json`

## Bottlenecks To Check Before Buying
- AI/data center: GPU supply, power availability, capex durability, cooling, networking, and customer concentration.
- Semiconductors: export controls, Taiwan/geopolitical risk, foundry capacity, and inventory correction risk.
- Software: seat growth, AI cannibalization, renewal pressure, and whether AI features are monetized or just demo value.
- China/HK platforms: policy risk, consumer weakness, competition, buyback support, and ADR/HK liquidity.
- Margin account: cash, loan balance, maintenance margin, liquidation cushion, and concentration under a correlated drawdown.

## Portfolio Bottleneck Read
- Gross exposure: **99.99%**.
- Primary bottleneck is setup quality; wait for zone discipline and catalyst checks.

## Watchlist Stress Points
